title: Documentation, Demonstration, Independent Defense, and Reflective Transfer · Claim Audit: Independent Defense
summary: A polished final presentation shows the product but hides failed hypotheses, human evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, contribution limits, and what remains unproven. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone independent defense increment in public capstone dossier and independent defense. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, cha…
objectives: Answer unseen causal, counterexample, tradeoff, ethics, accessibility, security, data, operations, and transfer questions using inspectable evidence.
Demonstrate ordinary, changed, boundary, inaccessible-before-repair, failure, recovery, rollback, and stakeholder-outcome cases from the reviewed artifact.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Independent Defense · Theory Independent Defense
steps.instruction:
theory case — A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Independent Defense contract for the supplied data.

For Predict Independent Defense · Theory Independent Defense, keep Independent Defense connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Independent Defense while producing public capstone dossier and independent defense.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The worked example variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Answer unseen causal, counterexample, tradeoff, ethics, accessibility, security, data, operations, and transfer questions using inspectable evidence. A defensible solution applies Independent Defense, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to public capstone dossier and independent defense.

content.code:
# Worked focus: capstone-independent-defense — Answer unseen causal, counterexample, tradeoff, ethics, accessibility, security, data, operations, and transfer questions using inspectable evidence.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-5
focus: capstone-independent-defense
decision-evidence: Answer unseen causal, counterexample, tradeoff, ethics, accessibility, security, data, operations, and transfer questions using inspectable evidence.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
